title: Zebedaios #2199
definition:
Zebedee = "my gift"

 1) a fisherman of Galilee, the father of the apostles James the Great
    and John, and the husband of Salome
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zebedee = "my gift"

 1) a fisherman of Galilee, the father of the apostles James the Great
    and John, and the husband of Salome

    NASB:  Zebedee, the father of the apostles James and John:
